core_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related STEM field
2–5 years of experience developing applications using Python
Experience with RESTful APIs and microservices development
Familiarity with event-driven architecture and messaging platforms
Experience with FastAPI, Flask, or similar Python frameworks
Knowledge of SQL and database technologies
Familiarity with source control, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing
Ability to work independently and collaboratively within cross-functional teams
nice_to_have: Exposure to Agentic AI frameworks, MCP, LLMs, and GenAI solutions
Familiarity with Kafka, MQ, or event-streaming platforms
Experience with cloud platforms and container technologies
Banking, risk management, or financial services experience
Understanding of distributed systems, observability, and platform monitoring
summary_paragraph: The role of a Python Software Engineer involves building and supporting modern software solutions within the financial technology domain. This mid-level position requires collaboration with senior engineers and business partners to deliver scalable and secure applications. The engineer will be responsible for developing Python-based applications, REST APIs, and microservices, while also contributing to AI workflows and integrations. The position demands adherence to engineering standards and involves participation in the full software development lifecycle.
